chapter_goal: Turn Lie-group actions into inspectable flows, orbits, generators, symplectic checks, Hamiltonian checks, and adjoint/coadjoint bookkeeping.

source_span_read.title: Actions
source_span_read.source_note: Inspected the local PDF text for Lecture 21: one-parameter groups, Lie groups, smooth actions, symplectic and Hamiltonian actions, adjoint/coadjoint representations, and the Hermitian matrices homework.

library_routing.representation: flow traces plus group-law endpoint check
library_routing.why: the flow law and orbit geometry are visible as reachable points and exact matrix products

library_routing.representation: orbit/stabilizer panel for translations, rotations, and sphere parallels
library_routing.why: orbits are geometric subsets; stabilizers are easiest to compare beside the picture

library_routing.representation: vector-field and contraction check for translation and circle rotation
library_routing.why: the two-form preservation and Hamiltonian identity become numerical residuals attached to the picture

library_routing.representation: proof dependency graph plus exact sl2 bracket check
library_routing.why: the representation law is a dependency chain and the derivative of conjugation is exact algebra

library_routing.representation: Bloch-sphere model for 2x2 traceless Hermitian matrices
library_routing.why: unitary conjugation fixes spectrum, so the orbit is visible as a sphere of equal eigenvalues

visual_sequence.concept: Flow law from uniqueness of integral curves
visual_sequence.inspection_target: compare direct time t+s motion with composed t then s motion
visual_sequence.validation: rotation matrix product residual is zero to numerical tolerance

visual_sequence.concept: Orbits and stabilizers of smooth actions
visual_sequence.inspection_target: see translation lines, rotation circles, and fixed-axis stabilizer behavior
visual_sequence.validation: sample orbit dimensions match the stabilizer ledger

visual_sequence.inspection_target: read which vector field preserves omega and which Hamiltonian generates it
visual_sequence.validation: A.T J A = J and dH = i_X omega residuals vanish

visual_sequence.inspection_target: trace why conjugation, differentiation, and dual pairing feed moment-map equivariance
see fixed spectrum as the orbit surface and stabilizer as commuting directions
visual_sequence.validation: unitary conjugation preserves eigenvalues; commutator kernel matches centralizer

computational_checks: Hamiltonian contraction identities for translation and rotation
Hermitian orbit eigenvalue and centralizer checks
